basic_details.job_title: PAU Junior Lab/ Field Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has released the official Junior Lab/Field Helper Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. 1862-1912 at the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the PAU Junior Lab/ Field Helper Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 and 63 years with a Middle qualification and Punjabi as a subject can apply offline on or before 24 July 2026. The official notification PDF and offline application form are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 63 years

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PAU Junior Lab/ Field Helper Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior Lab/ Field Helper Recruitment 2026 - Overview
PAU Junior Lab/ Field Helper Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PAU Junior Lab/ Field Helper Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior Lab/ Field Helper Vacancy Details 2026
Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 63 years

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior Lab/ Field Helper Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior Lab/ Field Helper Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Junior Lab/Field Helper Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the PAU Junior Lab/Field Helper posts is 24th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Lab/Field Helper post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Lab/Field Helper position in the Punjab Agricultural University Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is Middle with Punjabi. Candidates must possess this qualification to be eligible for the Junior Lab/Field Helper role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Lab/Field Helper position?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for this post is between 18 years (minimum) and 63 years (maximum). Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Lab/Field Helper post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 13486, along with benefits like ESIC and EPF contributions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the PAU Junior Lab/Field Helper Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Lab/Field Helper role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q8. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 50/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories. Please ensure you pay the correct fee along with your application.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University, which is https://pau.edu.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates along with the filled application form.
